description_long: This is a long, sub-style sandwich featuring a golden-brown, crusty baguette sliced horizontally and filled with layers of fresh ingredients. The filling includes leafy green lettuce, slices of tomato, red onion, and several layers of thinly sliced deli meats such as salami and ham. The sandwich is generously packed, with the ingredients visibly protruding from the sides, giving it a hearty and appetizing appearance. The bread has a slightly glossy, matte finish, and the vegetables inside add vibrant green, red, and purple hues. The sandwich appears fresh and ready to eat, with no visible packaging or branding. Its size and composition suggest it is intended as a substantial meal, suitable for takeout or casual dining in an urban environment.
description: A large, crusty baguette sandwich filled with layers of deli meats, lettuce, tomato, and red onion, displaying vibrant colors and a fresh, appetizing look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of the sandwich with visible layers of lettuce, tomato, red onion, and deli meats between the bread.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the cross-section of the sandwich, highlighting the thickness of the bread and the stacked fillings.
description_view_2: Rear view is similar to the front, showing the opposite side of the sandwich with the same layered ingredients.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the other cross-section, again emphasizing the sandwich's packed interior and bread thickness.
